subject: A massive undead centipede-like creature with a segmented body of bone and chitin, multiple claw-legs, and spiny protrusions; skulls litter the foreground
description: A large, grotesque centipede-like creature dominates the full frame, its segmented body composed of bone, chitinous plates, and a wrapped pale midsection that suggests corpse-wrappings. Multiple articulated claw-legs protrude from the body segments and the head area bristles with sharp spiny protrusions. The lower left foreground shows a pile of human skulls. The creature is rendered in brown, bone-white, and dark grey tones. The background is a subterranean stone chamber with arched alcoves carved into the wall. The overall impression is of a necromantic pest bred from the dead, low to the ground and filling the space with legs and spines.
foreground: The creature's full body with claw-legs extended and spiny head raised; skulls in lower left
background: Underground stone chamber with arched alcoves
